text: I feel a sense of quiet anticipation as I approach this glass-walled space. The exterior is clean, the lighting soft and clinical, yet there’s a promise of curiosity waiting just beyond the threshold. Inside, words like “R+D” and poetic reflections on innovation draw me in, hinting at a fusion of intellect and care. I feel both the formality of institutional order—fire hoses, signs, bureaucracy—and a gentle, almost subversive optimism. Here, I pause, keenly aware of the interplay between sterile walls and the subtler cultivation of new growth in ideas and possibility.
